# Success Metrics (KPIs)

To determine if SpendSmart is successfully operating as a lead generation engine for Credex, we will track the following metrics post-launch:

## 1. Top of Funnel (Acquisition)
* **Traffic Volume:** Unique daily visitors.
* **Traffic Source:** Organic vs. Direct vs. Social (tracking the success of the HackerNews/Twitter launch).
* **Viral Coefficient (K-factor):** How many new visitors are generated by each shareable UUID link.

## 2. Middle of Funnel (Activation & Engagement)
* **Audit Completion Rate:** The percentage of users who land on the form and successfully click "Run Audit Engine." (Target: >60%).
* **Average Identified Savings:** The mean dollar amount the audit engine flags per user. This validates if we are reaching the right target audience (Enterprise vs. Hobbyists).

## 3. Bottom of Funnel (Conversion)
* **Lead Capture Rate:** The percentage of users who reach the dashboard and enter their email to save the report. (Target: >15%).
* **High-Intent Lead Volume:** The raw number of captured emails where the associated audit showed >$500/mo in savings.
* **Sales Pipeline Velocity:** How quickly the Credex sales team can convert a "High-Intent Lead" from SpendSmart into a booked consultation call.
